name: aside
description: Side comments for humans and agents.

scripts.dev:build-reload: npm run build && npm run dev:install-built -- --vault .. && tmux new-session -d -s aside-reload-$(date +%s) 'obsidian plugin:reload id=aside vault=dev'
scripts.build: npm run test && npm run verify:worker && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run check:obsidian && npm run bundle && npm run release:artifacts:check
scripts.verify:worker: npm run typecheck:worker && npm run test:worker
scripts.test: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && find .test-dist/tests -type f -name '*.test.js' -exec node --test {} + && find tests -type f -name '*.test.mjs' -exec node --test {} +
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run release:notes:check
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json README.md

author: vicky
